name: Caramel Brownies
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix 1 German chocolate cake mix, 3/4 cup butter, and 1/3 cup evaporated milk in a bowl.
2. Add 1 cup walnuts to the mixture and spread half of it in a greased 9x13-inch cake pan.
3. Bake at 350 degrees for six minutes.
4. Melt 14-oz bag of caramels with 1/3 cup evaporated milk.
5. Sprinkle 6 oz bag of chocolate chips over the hot cake mixture.
6. Pour the melted caramel mixture over the chocolate chip layer.
7. Crumble the remaining cake mixture over the caramel layer and bake at 350 degrees for 20 minutes. Do not overbake.
